items.title: Canada beats Puerto Rico, 110-84, in FIBA World Cup qualifying.
items.author: Blake Murphy
items.body_excerpt:
Canada beats Puerto Rico, 110-84, in FIBA World Cup qualifying.

Canada now 5-0, +95, with a final game Monday vs Jamaica in Hamilton. Records carry over to next round, so it all counts.

Looked/sounded like an awesome crowd on TV.

items.title: Hollinger POTD Beno Udrih. Slovenian G played in Europe from 1997-04. Was drafted 28th by SA in 2004. Backup PG for SA from 2004-07 before starting in SAC from 2007-12, peaked at 14 ppg 5 apg in 2010-11. From 2011-17 backed up again. Has been coaching in G-League since 2020.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollinger POTD Beno Udrih. Slovenian G played in Europe from 1997-04. Was drafted 28th by SA in 2004. Backup PG for SA from 2004-07 before starting in SAC from 2007-12, peaked at 14 ppg 5 apg in 2010-11. From 2011-17 backed up again. Has been coaching in G-League since 2020.

A decade ago, a teddy bear randomly drawn from an arcade claw machine foretold Tarris Reed's future as a Spurs' draft pick.

That cosmic connection comes to fruition as Reed makes his Summer League debut today:

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs... via @expressnews

media.title: Why San Antonio first-round pick Tarris Reed Jr. was meant to be a Spur
